footer.tagline: The platform that connects families with the best childcare professionals, with confidence.

hero.heading: Childcare you can
hero.description: Connect with qualified educators near you. Book, pay, and track every service with complete peace of mind.

features.heading: Everything you need
features.smartSearchDesc: Filter by location, service type, availability, rate, and ratings. Find exactly what you need.
features.smartMatchingDesc: Our algorithm analyzes ratings, response rates, and relevance to suggest the best matches.
features.secureMessagingDesc: Communicate directly with educators through our internal messaging, without sharing your personal information.
features.simplifiedBookingDesc: Book in a few clicks with instant confirmation. Manage all your appointments from your personal space.
features.securePaymentDesc: Pay online with confidence. Your banking data is protected by bank-level encryption.
features.verifiedReviewsDesc: View authentic reviews from other parents and leave your own to help the community.
features.revenueDashboardDesc: Track your earnings in real time. Revenues are automatically deposited to your account after each completed service.
features.availabilityManagementDesc: Easily set your availability and manage incoming requests from your professional space.
features.autoHighlightDesc: The best ratings and consistency push you to the top of search results automatically.
features.professionalProfileDesc: Create a detailed profile with your certifications, specialties, and rates to attract the right families.
features.detailedStatsDesc: Analyze your response rate, completion rate, and activity trends month by month.
features.bankManagementDesc: Add and manage your secure banking information to receive payments seamlessly.

howItWorks.heading: Simple, fast, and secure
howItWorks.step1Desc: Filter by location, availability, rate, and specialty. Our matching algorithm finds the best profiles for your family.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Discuss directly through our secure internal messaging, then confirm your booking in a few clicks.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Payment is handled exclusively through the platform. The educator receives their payout automatically after each service.
howItWorks.step4Desc: After each service, leave a review to help the community and help the best educators stand out.

ctaSearch.description: Search among our verified educators and find the perfect profile for your needs.

becomeEducator.heading: Join the community
becomeEducator.description: Share your passion for education, manage your schedule freely, and earn a competitive income by helping families in your neighborhood.
becomeEducator.attractiveRevenueDesc: Set your own rates and keep 70% of each booking. Secure payments via Stripe.
becomeEducator.flexibleScheduleDesc: Set your availability and accept bookings that work for you.
becomeEducator.verifiedProfileDesc: Earn families' trust through our complete verification process.
becomeEducator.localClienteleDesc: Find families near you through our proximity-based search.
becomeEducator.simplifiedManagementDesc: Calendar, messaging, invoicing — everything is centralized in your dashboard.
becomeEducator.onlineReputationDesc: Receive verified reviews and build your professional reputation.
becomeEducator.step1Desc: Sign up in a few minutes with your basic information.
becomeEducator.step2Desc: Add your qualifications, identity verifications, and professional documents.
becomeEducator.step3Desc: Choose the services you offer, your rates, and your availability.
becomeEducator.step4Desc: Link your account via Stripe to receive payments automatically.
becomeEducator.step5Desc: Your profile is visible to families in your area. Bookings will start coming in!
becomeEducator.earningsDescription: With an average rate of $22/h and 20 hours per week, you can earn over $1,500 per month, after commission.
becomeEducator.requirement1: Be 18 years of age or older
becomeEducator.requirement5: Proof of citizenship or valid work permit

search.findIdealEducator: Find the ideal educator for your family
search.typeCity: Type your city name to find available educators near you.
search.widenCriteria: Try widening your search criteria or adjusting filters.

datePicker.unavailableNote: Greyed-out days are unavailable for this educator.

stripeOnboarding.checkingBody: One moment while we sync your account status with Stripe.
stripeOnboarding.successBody: You can now receive bookings and get paid. You'll appear in family searches starting now.
stripeOnboarding.pendingBody: Your account exists but Stripe is asking for additional details before enabling payouts. Resume setup from the Revenue screen.
stripeOnboarding.incompleteBody: Stripe onboarding wasn't completed. You stay hidden from families until it's finalized.
stripeOnboarding.refreshTitle: Stripe link expired — generating a new one
stripeOnboarding.refreshBody: We're asking Stripe for a fresh onboarding link. You'll be redirected automatically.
stripeOnboarding.refreshErrorBody: Something went wrong creating the Stripe link. Retry, or head back to the Revenue screen.

notFound.title: This page can't be found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Check the address, or use one of the links below.

weeklyPicker.selectionHint: Click a slot, then click adjacent slots to extend. Hours must be consecutive.
weeklyPicker.noEducatorAvailability: This educator hasn't set their availability yet.
weeklyPicker.noSlotsThisWeek: No free slots this week. Use the right arrow to view next week.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your SuperFamili account
auth.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in.
auth.genericSignInError: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
auth.invalidSession: Unable to obtain a valid session. Please try again.
auth.noProfileFound: No profile found for this account. Please sign up or contact support.
auth.profileVerificationError: Unable to verify your profile. Please check your connection and try again.
auth.emailAlreadyUsed: This email is already in use. Please sign in instead.
auth.passwordCriteria: The password does not meet security requirements.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few seconds before trying again.
auth.invalidEmail: Invalid email address. Please check and try again.
auth.codeExpired: The code has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
auth.cannotResend: Unable to resend the code. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If an account exists for this address, a code has been sent. Check your email.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter the code you received and your new password.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset. You can now sign in.
auth.changeEmailSubtitle: Enter the new address. We'll send a confirmation code to it.

profile.managePersonalAndProfessional: Manage your personal and professional information
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
profile.trainingCommitmentHint: Choose yes if you are willing to complete required or recommended training.
profile.photoTooLarge: Photo is too large. Maximum 5 MB.
profile.photoBadType: File type not allowed. Use JPG, PNG or WebP.

bookings.noBookingInCategory: You have no bookings in this category.
bookings.loadError: Error loading bookings. Please verify you are signed in.

newBooking.title: New booking
newBooking.subtitle: Complete the steps to book an educator
newBooking.securePaymentByStripe: Secure payment by Stripe. Your information is encrypted.
newBooking.paymentConfirmed: Payment confirmed! Your booking is active.
newBooking.selectEducatorFromSearch: Please select an educator from the search page.

services.manageServices: Manage the services you offer to families
services.addServiceDesc: Select a service and set your hourly rate.
services.deleteServiceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the service "{name}"? This action is irreversible.
services.noServiceDesc: Add your services to start receiving booking requests.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Set your weekly availability hours
availability.addExceptionDesc: Add a date when you will not be available.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.subtitle: View your payouts and manage your Stripe account
revenue.connectedDesc: Your Stripe account is active and ready to receive payments.
revenue.incompleteDesc: Your Stripe account is connected but payments are not yet enabled.
revenue.notConnectedDesc: Connect your Stripe account to receive payouts.
revenue.noPayoutDesc: Your payouts will appear here once you have completed bookings.
revenue.completedBookings: {count} service{count, plural, one {} other {s}} completed in {year}

locationPicker.addressNotFound: Address not found. Try a different format.
locationPicker.clickMapHint: Click on the map to set your location.

educatorProfileView.bookDescription: Reserve your time slot now and give your children quality care.

educatorDashboard.profilePhotoPromptBody: Add a clear photo to build trust with families. You can use the platform, but this reminder will stay visible.
educatorDashboard.documentsPromptTitle: {count} required document{count, plural, one {} other {s}} to complete
educatorDashboard.documentsPromptBody: Documents go through the backend and must be approved by admin before full activation.
educatorDashboard.stripePromptBodyStart: You won't receive any bookings until your Stripe account is connected. Families can't pay you without it.
educatorDashboard.stripePromptBodyResume: Your Stripe account exists but onboarding isn't complete. You stay hidden from families until it's finalized.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language for the site.

onboarding.finalStep: You're ready to use SuperFamili. Have a great experience!

parent.searchBar: Start by searching for an educator in your city.
parent.educatorCard: Click on a card to see the full educator profile.
parent.addChild: Add your children to your profile to book faster.
parent.reservationButton: When you're ready, click here to book.
parent.messagesIcon: Chat directly with your educators here.

educator.profileEdit: Complete your profile to attract more families.
educator.kycStep: Verify your identity to activate your account (required).
educator.documents: Upload your required documents: criminal background check, early-childhood first aid, work authorization, etc.
educator.references: Add optional professional or personal references.
educator.revenues: Track your earnings and download your annual statements here.
educator.availability: Set your availability to receive bookings.

admin.pendingReviews: Review pending signups and documents here.
admin.userManagement: Manage all users from this panel.

settings.replayDescription: Replay the onboarding tour for your role.
settings.replayToast: Tutorial reset — it will start again on your next page load.

signup.title: Terms and privacy
signup.subtitle: Before continuing, please accept:
signup.termsLabel: I have read and accept the
signup.privacyLabel: I have read and accept the
signup.marketingLabel: (Optional) I would like to receive marketing communications
signup.requiredError: You must accept the terms of use and the privacy policy to create an account.

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.introTitle: For the safety of the families you will help, we need to verify your identity. This verification uses a third-party service (Didit) which:
kyc.bullet1: Compares a photo of your ID document with a selfie
kyc.bullet2: Detects whether you are a real person (not a photo or video)
kyc.note: Your data will be stored securely and deleted upon request.

backgroundCheck.title: Criminal background check
backgroundCheck.introTitle: You are about to upload your criminal background check. This document is confidential and will be:
backgroundCheck.bullet2: Accessible only to the SuperFamili administrative team
backgroundCheck.bullet3: Deleted when your account is closed or upon request
backgroundCheck.checkbox: I authorize SuperFamili to store and access this document

referenceContact.title: Reference verification
referenceContact.intro: Our administrative team will contact the people you provide as references to confirm that they know you and can vouch for your character.
referenceContact.bullet1: We share no personal information about you beyond your name
referenceContact.bullet2: We do not share testimonials with other users
referenceContact.bullet3: You must have the consent of the people you list
referenceContact.checkbox: I authorize SuperFamili to contact my references

policyViewer.error: Could not load the policy content. Please try again.

audit.pageSubtitle: All the consents you have given SuperFamili. You can revoke any of them at any time (Loi 25).

revokeDialog.title: Revoke this consent?
revokeDialog.bodyEssential: This consent is essential. Revoking it will deactivate your SuperFamili account and log you out. You can reactivate your account later by re-accepting the terms.
revokeDialog.bodyNonEssential: You can re-accept this consent later at any time. If this consent was gating a feature (KYC, background check, references), that feature will be blocked until you re-consent.

references.pageIntro: References are optional. They help strengthen your file; we will only contact them if you add them.
references.notActivated: Optional: add up to 2 references to strengthen your file.
references.activated: You've added the recommended references. Our team may verify them if needed.
references.optionalHint: Optional: add up to 2 references to strengthen your file.
references.suggestedComplete: You've added the recommended references. Our team may verify them if needed.

form.testimonialHint: 50–1000 characters. No URLs or email addresses.
form.fullNameTooShort: Full name must be at least 2 characters.
form.fullNameTooLong: Full name must be at most 100 characters.
form.testimonialTooShort: Testimonial must be at least 50 characters.
form.testimonialTooLong: Testimonial must be at most 1000 characters.

relationships.childcare_parent: Parent of a child cared for

deleteDialog.title: Delete this reference?
deleteDialog.body: The reference will be removed from your profile.

references.cannotEditVerified: This reference has been verified and can no longer be edited or deleted.

documents.pageIntro: KYC verifies your identity. This page is for required and optional documents that are saved in the backend database and reviewed by admin.

background_check.label: Criminal background check
background_check.description: Less than 6 months old — from your local police station

cpr_certification.label: Early-childhood first aid
cpr_certification.description: Valid certification, generally 3 years from issue date

work_authorization.label: Citizenship or valid work permit
work_authorization.description: Proof of legal right to work in Canada

secondary_id.label: Secondary ID
secondary_id.description: Optional — if Didit only captured one piece of ID

diploma.label: Diplomas and training
diploma.description: Optional — you can upload multiple diplomas, certificates, or training proofs

uploadDialog.title: Upload {type}
uploadDialog.filePlaceholder: Choose a file (PDF, JPG, PNG or WebP, max 10 MB)
uploadDialog.issuedDateHint: The date written on the document
uploadDialog.issuedDateRequired: Issue date is required for this document type.
uploadDialog.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum 10 MB.
uploadDialog.fileBadType: File type not allowed. Use PDF, JPG, PNG or WebP.
uploadDialog.successToast: Document uploaded. Our team will review it within 48h.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this document?
deleteDialog.body: The file will be permanently removed. You can upload a replacement afterwards.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load your documents. Please refresh the page.
errors.deleteFailed: Could not delete the document. Please try again.

adminDocuments.pageSubtitle: Documents uploaded by educators waiting for approval.

kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.subtitle: We need to verify your identity to keep families safe
kyc.pageIntroDesktop: We need to verify your identity with a photo of your ID document and a selfie. For best quality, this step is done on your phone.
kyc.pageIntroMobile: We need to verify your identity with a photo of your ID document and a selfie. This will take about 2 minutes.
kyc.scanInstructions: Scan the QR code with your phone to start
kyc.waitingHint: Keep this tab open — it will update automatically once you finish on your phone.
kyc.emailComingSoon: Email delivery coming soon — use Copy link for now
kyc.smsComingSoon: SMS delivery coming soon — use Copy link for now
kyc.createSessionError: Could not start verification. Please try again.
kyc.successSubtitle: Your identity has been successfully verified.
kyc.failedSubtitle: Your verification could not be completed.
kyc.inReviewSubtitle: Your verification is being reviewed by our team. You'll be notified once a decision is made.
kyc.legalNotice: Your ID data is processed by Didit. It is used only to verify your identity.

license.pageSubtitle: Quebec law requires educators to declare whether they hold a government childcare license. Educators without a license may care for up to 5 children simultaneously; licensed educators may care for up to 15.
license.question: Do you have a government childcare license?
license.no: No, I don't have a license
license.uploadHelp: Upload your license below. Our team will review it within 48 hours.
license.uploadHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 10 MB.
license.submitWithoutLicense: Confirm — I don't have a license
license.successSubmitted: License submitted. Our team will review it within 48 hours.
license.successNoLicense: Confirmed. You may care for up to 5 children simultaneously.
license.errorNoFile: Please choose a file before submitting.
license.errorTooLarge: File is too large. Max 10 MB.
license.errorBadType: File type not allowed. Use PDF, JPG, PNG, or WebP.
license.legalNotice: This cap comes from Quebec's childcare services act. Exceeding it is illegal.

admin.approveConfirmBody: The educator will be allowed to care for up to 15 children simultaneously.
admin.rejectConfirmBody: Please provide a reason. It will be shown to the educator.
